feedback: The product arrived on time and works perfectly. Very happy with the quality and the packaging was great too.
Delivery took 2 weeks longer than expected. Product is okay but customer support was unhelpful when I called.

Good value for the price. Nothing extraordinary but does what it says. Would buy again.
The setup instructions were confusing but once I figured it out the product is excellent. Support team was patient and helpful.
